commit_message: Added an initialization loop to the SPI flash emulation module Added an initialization loop to the SPI flash emulation module Added an initialization loop to the SPI flash emulation module, which prevents mysterious errors caused by prefetching memory past the end of a program, resulting in undefined values propagating through the entire SoC.  Hopefully this will prevent others from wasting a lot of time tracking down the resulting non-issues in simulations.
